description: There is no context output for this command.
examples:
Command Example
!misp-delete-event event_id=735
Human Readable Output
11. Add a tag to an event or attribute
Adds a tag to the given UUID event or attribute.
Base Command
misp-add-tag
Input

!misp-delete-event event_id=735
Human Readable Output
11. Add a tag to an event or attribute
Adds a tag to the given UUID event or attribute.
Base Command
misp-add-tag
Input
Argument Name

Command Example
!misp-add-tag tag="Example tag" uuid=5ce29ac4-3b54-459e-a6ee-00acac110002
Context Example
{
name: misp-add-tag

outputs.description: MISP event ID. MISP.Event.Distribution MISP event distribution.

outputs.description: Threat level of the MISP event (1 High, 2 Medium, 3 Low, 4 Undefined). MISP.Event.PublishTimestamp Timestamp of the publish time (if published).
outputs.name: MISP.Event.ThreatLevelID

outputs.description: Email address of the event creator. MISP.Event.Date date
outputs.name: MISP.Event.EventCreatorEmail

outputs.description: MISP.Event.Locked Whether the event is locked. MISP.Event.OwnerOrganisation.ID
outputs.name: Event creation date.

outputs.description: Owner organization ID. MISP.Event.OwnerOrganisation.Name Owner organization name.
outputs.name: number

outputs.description: Owner organization UUID. MISP.Event.RelatedEvent.ID Event IDs of related events (can be a list).
outputs.name: MISP.Event.OwnerOrganisation.UUID

outputs.description: Whether email lock is proposed. MISP.Event.Timestamp Timestamp of the event.
outputs.name: MISP.Event.ProposalEmailLock

outputs.description: Galaxy type MISP.Event.Published Whether the event is published.
outputs.name: MISP.Event.Galaxy.Type

outputs.description: Whether correlation is disabled. MISP.Event.UUID Event UUID.
outputs.name: MISP.Event.DisableCorrelation

outputs.description: Event shadow attributes. MISP.Event.Attribute.Distribution Attribute distribution.
outputs.name: MISP.Event.ShadowAttribute

outputs.description: Attribute value. MISP.Event.Attribute.EventID Attribute event ID.
outputs.name: MISP.Event.Attribute.Value

outputs.description: Attribute timestamp. MISP.Event.Attribute.Deleted Is the attribute deleted.
outputs.name: MISP.Event.Attribute.Timestamp

outputs.description: Is attribute correlation disabled. MISP.Event.Attribute.Type Attribute type.
outputs.name: MISP.Event.Attribute.DisableCorrelation

outputs.description: Attribute shadow attribute. MISP.Event.Attribute.ToIDs Is the Intrusion Detection System flag set.
outputs.name: MISP.Event.Attribute.ShadowAttribute

outputs.description: Attribute category. MISP.Event.Attribute.SharingGroupID Attribute sharing group ID.
outputs.name: MISP.Event.Attribute.Category

outputs.description: Attribute comment. MISP.Event.Analysis Event analysis (0 Initial, 1 Ongoing, 2 Completed).
outputs.name: MISP.Event.Attribute.Comment

outputs.description: Event sharing group ID. MISP.Event.Tag.Name All tag names in the event.
outputs.name: MISP.Event.SharingGroupID
